nasb.text: Ascribe to the Lord the glory due to His name; Worship the Lord in holy array.

esv.text: Ascribe to the Lord the glory due his name; worship the Lord in the splendor of holiness.

cnv.text: 要把耶和華的名的榮耀歸給他， 要以聖潔的裝束敬拜耶和華。

ccb.text: 要赞美祂荣耀的名， 穿上圣洁的衣服敬拜祂。

csbs.text: 你们当把耶和华名的荣耀归给他， 当穿上圣洁的装束敬拜他。
